implemented_slice_constraints.migration_execution: L07-W02 verified snapshot-first schema 1 to 2 migration on explicitly authorized disposable stores
implemented_slice_constraints.view_policy_lifecycle: human-authorized immutable create/revise plus serialized activate/supersede/retire admission fences; exact-active structural disclosure only
implemented_slice_constraints.mixed_owner_discovery: identity-only Case/Frame candidates and bounded explicit links with store/policy/query/fence/revision/bounds/audience-bound opaque handoff; typed owner façade hydration only
implemented_slice_constraints.consumer_observation: at-least-once event paging, duplicate-safe store/event identity, exact-view checkpoint CAS with bounded pending events, and one-fence cursor-expiry/policy-transition snapshot reconciliation
implemented_slice_constraints.current_first_impact: disposable bounded direct reverse projection over explicit semantic dependencies with cycle-safe owner deduplication, descriptive lifecycle, truthful overflow, and no owner mutation or EA effects authority
implemented_slice_constraints.case_revision_assembly: complete canonical Case create and commit_revision
implemented_slice_constraints.case_discovery: exact ID/namespace alias resolve, cohesive historical read, bounded scan lexical search and explicit-link traversal
implemented_slice_constraints.case_lifecycle_portability: ordinary tombstone stage/commit, staged-only purge inspection, immutable audience-aware owner fragments and deterministic Markdown reconciliation proposals
implemented_slice_constraints.frame_query: exact receipt/resolve/current/history/discovery/disposition reads, active-only/all-selected Discovery and current/all-selected disposition projection, and selector-bound fenced paging
implemented_slice_constraints.common_subset: typed resolve/list/bounded lexical search over case/frame normalized records
implemented_slice_constraints.markdown_profile: exclusive Markdown installation with full typed reduced common operations, digest-guarded atomic Case replacement, manifest-selected coherent Frame/Discovery/disposition generations, deterministic interchange, and explicit omitted SQLite guarantees
implemented_slice_constraints.exact_identity: UUID-based Case frontmatter plus authority-marker-bound digest-verified manifests; typed stable Frame, Discovery, disposition-boundary, Case-disposition, and base-version IDs with exact digest-verified manifest bindings
implemented_slice_constraints.frame_authority_scope: one-or-more granted namespaces including active home grant; hidden namespace IDs recursively masked
implemented_slice_constraints.legacy_reconciliation: disposition-aware immutable non-mutating preparation with absent/present evidence and exact/ambiguous/unmatched structural diffs; no writeback, rename, watcher, or view lifecycle creation
